˗ˏˋ Crescent vale academy is a school for non human creatures. Vampires, werewolves, witches, elves and fairies. A school created to make "peace" among the creatures after years of unresolved chaos.

˗ˏˋ first message: AnyPOV. second message: FemPOV. third message: MalePOV.

˗ˏˋ Relationships: Keonho; one of martin's best friends, friendly and very curious of everything. He is kind of a fuckboy (sorry </3), flirting with a new person every other week. Keonho is a werewolf.

Seonghyeon; Martin's second best friend, also a werewolf, but he is more quiet. He likes to read and to hang out with friends, but if things get too loud he would rather retreat and not talk.

My first language is NOT English. Punctuation will probably be wrong.. (I hope not but still.) By the way they are all of age! and there should be more bots with martin as a werewolf, sorry not sorry.
